illustration-stroke-color-default.$description: Default stroke color to define shape and provide essential detail.

illustration-stroke-width-default.$description: Default stroke width to define shape and provide essential detail.

illustration-fill-color-default.$description: Default fill color for an element where specific meaning or emphasis is not required.

illustration-status-fill-color-neutral.$description: Used as a fill to convey a concept which is neither positive or negative.

illustration-status-fill-color-success.$description: Used as a fill to convey a success or active concept, has a positive connotation.

illustration-status-fill-color-warning.$description: Used as a fill to convey a caution or warning concept, has a slightly negative connotation.

illustration-status-fill-color-danger.$description: Used as a fill to convey a critical or danger concept, has a negative connotation.

illustration-accent-stroke-color-orange.$description: Used for orange accent stroke detail on an object or attention-drawing element.

illustration-accent-stroke-color-teal.$description: Used for teal accent stroke detail on an object or attention-drawing element.

illustration-accent-stroke-color-strong.$description: Used for dark accent stroke detail on an object or attention-drawing element.

illustration-accent-fill-color-subtle.$description: Used to add depth to a secondary element and supporting surface.

illustration-accent-fill-color-strong.$description: Used for an element requiring visual emphasis without competing with primary content or status indicators.

illustration-accent-fill-color-orange.$description: Used to add orange to a secondary element and supporting surface.

illustration-accent-fill-color-teal.$description: Used to add teal to a secondary element and supporting surface.

illustration-base-fill-color.$description: Used for the consistent background shape present across all illustrations. Provides a unified foundation that visually grounds each illustration while maintaining system cohesion.

background-color-default.$description: Used for the default background color.

background-color-subtle.$description: Used to slightly differentiate the background from the default.

background-color-strong.$description: Used to make the background easily stand out from the default.

background-color-disabled.$description: Used to identify a disabled section.

background-color-overlap.$description: Used for components, like tooltips and drawers, and content, like a sticky header, that overlap other content.

background-color-section.$description: Used for containers, like a card header, that are visually distinct from the default page background only when necessary to maintain affordance and hierarchy in different modes.

background-color-overlay.$description: Used for an overlay that covers other content.

control-background-color-default.$description: Used for form control (input, radio button, checkbox, textarea) default background.

control-background-color-disabled.$description: Used for disabled form control (checkbox, input, radio button, textarea) background.

control-background-color-concatenation.$description: Used for the background of static content that prepends or appends a text input.

control-background-color-readonly.$description: Used for the background of static content that prepends or appends a text input.

control-background-color-selected-defaul.$description: Used for checked and indeterminate (selected) form control (checkbox, radio button) background.

control-background-color-selected-hover.$description: Used for checked and indeterminate (selected) form control (checkbox, radio button) background on hover.

control-background-color-selected-focus.$description: Used for checked and indeterminate (selected) form control (checkbox, radio button) background on hover.

control-border-color-default.$description: Used for form control (input, radio button, checkbox, textarea) default border.

control-border-color-hover.$description: Used for form control (input, radio button, checkbox, textarea) border on hover.

control-border-color-focus.$description: Used for form control (input, radio button, checkbox, textarea) border on focus.

control-border-color-disabled.$description: Used for disabled form control (input, radio button, checkbox, textarea) border.

control-border-color-error.$description: Used for invalid form control (input, textarea) border.

control-border-color-selected-default.$description: Used for checked and indeterminate (selected) form control (checkbox, radio button) border.

control-border-color-selected-hover.$description: Used for checked and indeterminate (selected) form control (checkbox, radio button) border on hover.

control-border-color-selected-focus.$description: Used for checked and indeterminate (selected) form control (checkbox, radio button) border on focus.

control-border-radius.$description: Used for form control (input, radio button, checkbox, textarea) default border radius.

control-text-color-error.$description: Used for the helper text when the input is invalid.

control-text-color-valid.$description: Used for the helper text when the input is valid.

control-placeholder-color.$description: Used for placeholder text within inputs.

control-indicator-color-selected.$description: Used for checkbox and radio button state indicators.

control-indicator-color-disabled.$description: Used for disabled checkbox and radio button state indicators.

feedback-border-radius.$description: Used for the border radius of a feedback element.

feedback-strong-background-color.$description: Used for a background associated with strong feedback like a tooltip or toast message.

feedback-strong-border-color.$description: Used for the border associated with strong feedback.

feedback-strong-text-color.$description: Used for text on a strong feedback background.

feedback-strong-icon-color.$description: Used for an icon on a strong feedback background.

feedback-strong-link-color.$description: Used for a link on a strong feedback background.

feedback-neutral-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a neutral feedback item when there isn't a specific meaning or urgency.

feedback-neutral-border-color.$description: Used for the border of a neutral feedback item when there isn't a specific meaning or urgency.

feedback-neutral-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a neutral feedback item when there isn't a specific meaning or urgency.

feedback-neutral-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a neutral feedback item when there isn't a specific meaning or urgency.

feedback-info-background-color.$description: Used for the background of an informational feedback item when highlighting new information or a change that doesn't require immediate action.

feedback-info-border-color.$description: Used for the border of an informational feedback item when highlighting new information or a change that doesn't require immediate action.

feedback-info-text-color.$description: Used for the text of an informational feedback item when highlighting new information or a change that doesn't require immediate action.

feedback-info-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of an informational feedback item when highlighting new information or a change that doesn't require immediate action.

feedback-success-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a success feedback item when confirming the successful completion of a user-initiated action.

feedback-success-border-color.$description: Used for the border of a success feedback item when confirming the successful completion of a user-initiated action.

feedback-success-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a success feedback item when confirming the successful completion of a user-initiated action.

feedback-success-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a success feedback item when confirming the successful completion of a user-initiated action.

feedback-warning-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a warning feedback item when notifying about a potential issue or sensitive information.

feedback-warning-border-color.$description: Used for the border of a warning feedback item when notifying about a potential issue or sensitive information.

feedback-warning-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a warning feedback item when notifying about a potential issue or sensitive information.

feedback-warning-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a warning feedback item when notifying about a potential issue or sensitive information.

feedback-danger-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a danger feedback item when notifying about a critical issue that has just occurred and requires immediate attention.

feedback-danger-border-color.$description: Used for the border of a danger feedback item when notifying about a critical issue that has just occurred and requires immediate attention.

feedback-danger-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a danger feedback item when notifying about a critical issue that has just occurred and requires immediate attention.

feedback-danger-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a danger feedback item when notifying about a critical issue that has just occurred and requires immediate attention.

feedback-brand-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a brand-related feedback item when highlighting information that pertains to GitLab.

feedback-brand-border-color.$description: Used for the border of a brand-related feedback item when highlighting information that pertains to GitLab.

feedback-brand-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a brand-related feedback item when highlighting information that pertains to GitLab.

feedback-brand-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a brand-related feedback item when highlighting information that pertains to GitLab.

focus-ring-outer-color.$description: Used for the outer color portion of the focus ring.

focus-ring-inner-color.$description: Used for the inner neutral portion of the focus ring.

highlight-match-background-color.$description: Used for temporary visual emphasis of backgrounds of matched search terms, filtered results, or autocomplete suggestions without implying any particular state or meaning.

highlight-match-text-color.$description: Used for text within temporarily highlighted matches to maintain readability while drawing attention without conveying status.

highlight-target-background-color.$description: Used for temporary visual emphasis for backgrounds of referenced elements (for example URL anchors, hover states) or to show relationships between content without implying status or requiring action.

highlight-target-border-color.$description: Used to provide additional visual emphasis for borders of temporarily targeted elements or when visualizing connections between related content, distinct from persistent states.

icon-color-default.$description: Used for the default icon color. Can be paired with default text.

icon-color-subtle.$description: Used for a static or decorational icon. Can be paired with subtle text.

icon-color-strong.$description: Used for an icon with the highest contrast.

icon-color-disabled.$description: Used for an icon within a disabled section.

icon-color-link.$description: Used for an icon within a link.

icon-color-info.$description: Used for an icon associated with information or help.

icon-color-warning.$description: Used for an icon associated with a warning.

icon-color-danger.$description: Used for an icon associated with an error or danger.

icon-color-success.$description: Used for an icon associated with success or validity.

status-neutral-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a neutral status item when the status is neither positive nor negative, or when indicating a special but stable state.

status-neutral-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a neutral status item when the status is neither positive nor negative, or when indicating a special but stable state.

status-neutral-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a neutral status item when the status is neither positive nor negative, or when indicating a special but stable state.

status-info-background-color.$description: Used for the background of an informational status item when indicating a noteworthy ongoing condition or a state of active progress.

status-info-text-color.$description: Used for the text of an informational status item when indicating a noteworthy ongoing condition or a state of active progress.

status-info-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of an informational status item when indicating a noteworthy ongoing condition or a state of active progress.

status-success-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a success status item when indicating a positive outcome, completion, or desired state. Clearly conveys a positive connotation.

status-success-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a success status item when indicating a positive outcome, completion, or desired state. Clearly conveys a positive connotation.

status-success-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a success status item when indicating a positive outcome, completion, or desired state. Clearly conveys a positive connotation.

status-warning-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a warning status item when indicating a state that requires heightened awareness or caution, but is not necessarily problematic. Represents a state that warrants extra attention or care when interacting with the item.

status-warning-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a warning status item when indicating a state that requires heightened awareness or caution, but is not necessarily problematic. Represents a state that warrants extra attention or care when interacting with the item.

status-warning-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a warning status item when indicating a state that requires heightened awareness or caution, but is not necessarily problematic. Represents a state that warrants extra attention or care when interacting with the item.

status-danger-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a danger status item when indicating a critical or severely problematic current state. Clearly conveys a negative connotation, representing a serious, ongoing issue or undesired condition.

status-danger-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a danger status item when indicating a critical or severely problematic current state. Clearly conveys a negative connotation, representing a serious, ongoing issue or undesired condition.

status-danger-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a danger status item when indicating a critical or severely problematic current state. Clearly conveys a negative connotation, representing a serious, ongoing issue or undesired condition.

status-brand-background-color.$description: Used for the background of a brand-related status item when highlighting the state of unique features or elements specific to the GitLab brand identity. Helps distinguish and emphasize brand-specific elements within the interface.

status-brand-text-color.$description: Used for the text of a brand-related status item when highlighting the state of unique features or elements specific to the GitLab brand identity. Helps distinguish and emphasize brand-specific elements within the interface.

status-brand-icon-color.$description: Used for the icon of a brand-related status item when highlighting the state of unique features or elements specific to the GitLab brand identity. Helps distinguish and emphasize brand-specific elements within the interface.

text-color-default.$description: Used for the default text color.

text-color-subtle.$description: Used for supplemental text that doesn't need to be as prominent as other text.

text-color-strong.$description: Used for text with the highest contrast.

text-color-warning.$description: Used for text that requires caution or careful attention.

text-color-danger.$description: Used for text indicating a problem, critical state, destructive action, error, failure, removal, stop, or declination.

text-color-success.$description: Used for text indicating success, completion, approval, addition, or validity.
